note: Environment capability: Docker available/running, services active, git clean/origin-synced on entry, /api/status and /login healthy in deterministic preflight, recent logs clean, and swap steady at one 6G /swapfile. Selected user journey: /backups English-language create backup form truthfulness after backup creation moved to Durable Job. Change: DOM i18n fallback now translates 创建并执行备份 as Create and queue backup and translates the description to Durable Job background queue/PENDING-RUNNING-COMPLETED-FAILED refresh semantics; old immediate deploy/backup.sh wording is absent. Evidence: targeted dom translation/bridge tests passed 8/8; authenticated production curl for /backups with vps-locale=en returned 200 and showed the new queued source copy, old sync source copy absent, and DOM bridge present; built .next static chunk contains the new English copy. Regression: git diff --check passed, targeted i18n tests passed, npm run typecheck passed, npm run lint -- --max-warnings=0 passed, full npm run verify passed with 214 files / 1005 tests plus Next build/runtime/deploy-assets. Production: after chown/restart/reload, first /api/status hit a transient 502 restart-window but retry returned 200 healthy 3/3, services active, worker startup logs normal, smoke 25/25 passed, /backups unauth 307 and /api/status 200, filtered logs clean. Cleanup: deleted temporary qa_cron_i18n user and temp helper/session files. Next candidates: QuickService durable job migration/config diff/history/rollback, storage/Direct Gateway real probe, stale SFTP inventory reconciliation, backup retention/offsite/restore drills.

lastRun.title: Backups Durable Job English copy truthfulness
lastRun.summary: /backups English DOM translations now match the queued Durable Job backup creation model.

evidence: English DOM fallback translates the create backup form as Create and queue backup.
Production authenticated /backups HTML contains the queued source copy and no old immediate deploy/backup.sh source copy.
Built .next static bundle contains the new English copy.
Targeted tests, lint, typecheck, full verify, restart, smoke, status, and log scan passed.
remaining: QuickService install/update/uninstall durable-job migration with config diff/history/rollback.
Backup retention, offsite backup, and restore-drill automation.
